design_note: Each endpoint has exactly 30 granular functional test cases. Required fields and validation rules are split into separate test cases rather than lumped into generic validation cases.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authorized Affiliate user can upload a valid CSV batch file.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; valid tenant and affiliate context; product is eligible.
test_cases.input_data: CSV file with all required headers and valid rows; productId=PROD-001
steps: Submit multipart request with CSV and productId.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authorized Affiliate user can upload a valid XLSX batch file.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; valid tenant and affiliate context; product is eligible.
test_cases.input_data: XLSX file with all required headers and valid rows; productId=PROD-001
steps: Submit multipart request with XLSX and productId.

test_cases.test_description: Verify missing productId is rejected as a standalone case.
test_cases.input_data: Valid CSV file but productId omitted.

test_cases.test_description: Verify blank productId is rejected.
test_cases.input_data: Valid CSV file; productId empty string.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unknown productId is rejected.
Verify product not eligible for affiliate is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; product exists but is not mapped to affiliate.

test_cases.test_description: Verify missing file part is rejected.
test_cases.input_data: No file part in multipart request.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty uploaded file is rejected.
Verify PDF upload is rejected.
Verify TXT upload is rejected.
Verify file extension spoofing is rejected.
test_cases.input_data: File named .csv but content is binary/PDF.

test_cases.test_description: Verify missing firstName header is rejected.
Verify missing lastName header is rejected.
Verify missing phone header is rejected.
Verify missing email header is rejected.
Verify missing dob header is rejected.
Verify missing idType header is rejected.
Verify missing idNumber header is rejected.
Verify duplicate headers are rejected.
Verify unknown extra headers follow the agreed template policy.
test_cases.input_data: CSV contains extra column not in template.
test_cases.expected_result: Either accepted if extensions allowed or 422 if strict template required; behavior must match SRS/template policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify header casing is handled according to template policy.
test_cases.input_data: CSV with FIRSTNAME/LASTNAME instead of firstName/lastName.
test_cases.expected_result: Accepted or rejected consistently according to documented template policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify Issuing Bank users cannot upload batch card creation files.
Verify Service Provider users cannot upload batch card creation files.
Verify upload requires authentication.
Verify upload with foreign tenant/affiliate context is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate A authenticated; request uses Affiliate B context.

test_cases.test_description: Verify batch stores tenant, affiliate, and product association.
test_cases.expected_result: Batch record references correct tenantId, affiliateId, productId.

test_cases.test_description: Verify successful upload creates batch in UPLOADED status.
Verify a valid large file within configured limit is accepted.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; file size within limit.

test_cases.test_description: Verify file exceeding configured size limit is rejected.
Verify upload activity is recorded in AuditLog.
test_cases.expected_result: Audit entry created with actor, tenant, affiliate, batchId, outcome.

test_cases.test_description: Verify validation completes successfully when all rows are valid.
test_cases.preconditions: Existing UPLOADED batch in caller scope with all valid rows.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unknown batchId is rejected.
Verify validation rejects a batch outside caller tenant/affiliate scope.
test_cases.preconditions: Authenticated Affiliate A; batch belongs to Affiliate B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify validation requires authentication.
Verify validation only applies to uploaded/pre-processing batches.
test_cases.preconditions: Existing batch in PROCESSING or COMPLETED state.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing firstName is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing firstName.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with firstName required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing lastName is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing lastName.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with lastName required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing phone is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing phone.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with phone required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing email is independently flagged invalid when required.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing email.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with email required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing DOB is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing DOB.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with DOB required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing idType is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing idType.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with idType required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing idNumber is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing idNumber.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with idNumber required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing cardType is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing cardType.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with cardType required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row missing currency is independently flagged invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has one row missing currency.
test_cases.expected_result: Specific row invalid with currency required error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed phone number is invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has row with invalid phone.
test_cases.expected_result: Row invalid with phone format error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed email is invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has row with invalid email.
test_cases.expected_result: Row invalid with email format error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed DOB is invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has row with invalid DOB.
test_cases.expected_result: Row invalid with DOB format error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify future DOB is invalid.
test_cases.expected_result: Row invalid with DOB business error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify underage customer is invalid where age rule applies.
Verify unsupported idType is invalid.
Verify malformed idNumber is invalid.
Verify unsupported cardType is invalid.
Verify unsupported currency is invalid.
Verify product/currency mismatch is invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch selected product supports USD only.
test_cases.expected_result: Row invalid with product eligibility error.

test_cases.test_description: Verify product not eligible for affiliate is invalid.
test_cases.preconditions: Batch product not available to affiliate.
test_cases.expected_result: Batch/rows rejected based on product eligibility.

test_cases.test_description: Verify duplicate identity number in batch is flagged.
test_cases.expected_result: Duplicate rows flagged invalid or warning per policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify duplicate phone in batch is flagged where uniqueness applies.
test_cases.expected_result: Duplicate phone rows flagged per policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify total, valid, and invalid row counts are accurate.
test_cases.preconditions: Uploaded batch has known mix of valid and invalid rows.

test_cases.test_description: Verify validation results persist per row.
test_cases.expected_result: Each row has persisted validation result.

test_cases.test_description: Verify validation is audited.

endpoints.name: Submit Batch Card Creation for Processing

test_cases.test_description: Verify validated batch can be submitted.
Verify UPLOADED batch cannot be submitted before validation.
Verify batch with validation failures cannot be submitted when policy requires all rows valid.
test_cases.expected_result: 409/422; invalid rows prevent submission or only valid rows processed per policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify PROCESSING batch cannot be resubmitted.
Verify COMPLETED batch cannot be submitted again.
Verify unknown batchId returns 404.
Verify malformed batchId is rejected.
Verify submit requires authentication.
Verify foreign batch submit is blocked.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate A; batch belongs Affiliate B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify processing is asynchronous for valid rows.
test_cases.expected_result: Response indicates queued/processing; background workers handle rows.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row for existing customer resolves customerId.
test_cases.preconditions: Validated row matches existing customer identity.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row for new customer creates customer record.
Verify card is created for each valid row.
Verify one row failure does not stop other rows.
test_cases.preconditions: Validated batch with one induced row failure.
test_cases.expected_result: Failed row marked FAILED; others processed.

test_cases.test_description: Verify successful row status becomes PROCESSED.
Verify failed row status becomes FAILED.
Verify created customer reference is persisted.
Verify created card reference is persisted.
Verify all successful rows set batch COMPLETED.
Verify all failed rows set batch FAILED.
Verify mixed outcome sets PARTIALLY_COMPLETED.
Verify replay of submit request is safe.
test_cases.expected_result: Second call rejected or idempotently returns current state; no duplicate processing.

test_cases.test_description: Verify large validated batch is accepted for processing.
test_cases.preconditions: Validated large batch within allowed limit.

test_cases.test_description: Verify batch with zero valid rows is rejected for submit.
test_cases.preconditions: Validated batch with zero valid rows.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row failing single-card eligibility rules is marked failed.
test_cases.preconditions: Validated row fails downstream card rule.

test_cases.test_description: Verify CMS/card creation failure is handled per-row.
test_cases.expected_result: Row FAILED or retried according to policy; batch continues.

test_cases.test_description: Verify BatchExecutionLog is created.
Verify submit action is audited.
Verify status reflects submit outcome.
test_cases.expected_result: Status is PROCESSING/COMPLETED according to timing.

test_cases.test_description: Verify status retrieval for UPLOADED batch.
Verify status retrieval for VALIDATED batch.
Verify status retrieval for PROCESSING batch.
Verify status retrieval for COMPLETED batch.
Verify status retrieval for FAILED batch.
Verify status retrieval for PARTIALLY_COMPLETED batch.
Verify unknown batch returns 404.
Verify malformed batchId is rejected.
Verify unauthenticated status retrieval is rejected.
Verify status retrieval for foreign batch is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate A; batch belongs Affiliate B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response includes batch identifier.
Verify response includes current status.
Verify response includes total row count.
Verify response includes valid row count.
Verify response includes invalid row count.
Verify response includes processed row count.
Verify response includes failed row count.
Verify response includes created timestamp.
Verify response includes updated timestamp.
Verify completed timestamp appears for completed batches.
Verify status retrieval does not mutate batch.
test_cases.expected_result: No state/count/timestamp mutation caused by read.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response uses correct status contract.
Verify batch with zero rows returns deterministic summary.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; zero-row batch exists if allowed.
test_cases.expected_result: Counts returned as zero, no error unless state invalid.

test_cases.test_description: Verify large row counts are returned accurately.
test_cases.expected_result: Counts are accurate and not truncated.

test_cases.test_description: Verify status access is audited where required.
test_cases.expected_result: Audit entry recorded where policy requires.

test_cases.test_description: Verify forbidden response does not leak foreign batch metadata.
Verify authorized Service Provider scope reads status if permitted.
test_cases.preconditions: Service Provider with permitted read access.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 read-only or 403 according to SRS policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify bank user cannot access affiliate batch unless policy permits.

endpoints.name: Get Batch Card Creation Row Results

test_cases.test_description: Verify all row results are returned for in-scope batch.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; batch has row results.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unknown batch rows return 404.
Verify malformed batchId rejected.
Verify rows endpoint requires authentication.
Verify foreign batch rows are blocked.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate A; batch belongs Affiliate B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify filter by VALID row status.
Verify filter by INVALID row status.
Verify filter by PROCESSED row status.
Verify filter by FAILED row status.
Verify unsupported row status is rejected.
Verify first page pagination.
Verify second page pagination.
Verify pageSize=1 boundary.
Verify page=0 rejected.
Verify pageSize=0 rejected.
Verify excessive pageSize policy.
test_cases.expected_result: Rejected or capped according to API policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty filtered result is well formed.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 with empty data array and wrapper.

test_cases.test_description: Verify rowNumber is returned.
Verify rowStatus is returned.
Verify validation errors returned for invalid rows.
Verify warnings returned where applicable.
Verify linked customer reference returned for processed rows.
Verify linked card reference returned for processed rows.
Verify row traces back to uploaded input.
Verify returned rows are ordered by source row number by default.
test_cases.expected_result: Rows sorted by rowNumber unless sort specified.

test_cases.test_description: Verify rows visible during/after partial completion.
Verify row results can be retrieved during processing if supported.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 with current row states or 409 if unavailable by policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row results response contract.
test_cases.expected_result: page, pageSize, data and row fields match contract.

test_cases.test_description: Verify row results access audited if required.
Verify forbidden row request does not leak row data.

endpoints.name: Download Batch Card Creation Result File

test_cases.test_description: Verify completed batch result can be downloaded.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; completed batch has artifact.

test_cases.test_description: Verify partially completed batch result can be downloaded.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; PARTIALLY_COMPLETED batch has artifact.

test_cases.test_description: Verify UPLOADED batch result download rejected.
Verify VALIDATED batch result download rejected.
Verify PROCESSING batch result download rejected.
Verify FAILED batch without artifact cannot download.
Verify completed batch without artifact is rejected.
Verify unknown batch download returns 404.
Verify malformed batchId rejected.
Verify download requires authentication.
Verify foreign batch download is blocked.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate A; batch belongs Affiliate B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify download reference cannot be reused cross-scope.
test_cases.preconditions: Download ref created for Affiliate A.

test_cases.test_description: Verify download response includes file name.
Verify response includes valid content type.
Verify CSV result artifact can be downloaded if format is CSV.
Verify XLSX result artifact can be downloaded if format is XLSX.
Verify result file includes all source rows.
test_cases.preconditions: Completed batch with known row count.
test_cases.expected_result: Artifact contains all processed/invalid rows as per policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify result file includes row status column.
Verify result file includes validation/processing errors.
Verify result file includes linked customer/card refs for successful rows.
Verify repeated download does not mutate state.
test_cases.expected_result: Both downloads succeed; batch state unchanged.

test_cases.test_description: Verify expired/missing artifact is handled correctly.
Verify download activity is audited.
Verify forbidden download does not leak artifact metadata.
Verify Service Provider download follows authorized scope policy.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 if permitted or 403 if not, according to SRS policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify bank user cannot download affiliate batch result unless permitted.
Verify download requested while artifact generation is finalizing is deterministic.
test_cases.preconditions: Batch status just completed but artifact generation pending.

test_cases.test_description: Verify downloaded file is not corrupt.
test_cases.expected_result: File is readable and well formed.

test_cases.test_description: Verify download response contract is valid.
Verify batch status remains consistent after download.
